pr.title: Non-record: 5L MLP4x + SlidingWindow + SWA + QAT — val_bpb 1.3827 (1xH100)

output.summary: Autonomous search picked a width-focused 5-layer MLP4x with BigramHash/SmearGate, QAT, SWA, and sliding-window eval to stay under 16MB.
techniques: Width-focused 5-layer MLP4x backbone with BigramHash embeddings and SmearGate gating.
QAT with int8 STE during training plus SWA over 18 checkpoints for smoother weights.
Sliding-window evaluation with stride 64 to reuse long-context scoring.
